_meta.description: Reference image database for exercise visual matching
_meta.note: URLs point to publicly available exercise demonstration images/GIFs

squat.key_cues: Bar on upper back, bilateral stance, deep knee flexion, torso leans forward slightly

front_squat.key_cues: Bar racked on front deltoids, very upright torso, deep squat

bulgarian_split_squat.key_cues: Rear foot elevated on bench, front leg does the work, one knee bends deeply

lunge.key_cues: Step forward, both knees bend, front thigh parallel to floor

deadlift.key_cues: Bar starts on floor, hips hinge, torso goes from horizontal to vertical, arms stay straight

sumo_deadlift.key_cues: Wide foot stance, toes pointed out, hands between legs, more upright torso than conventional

rdl.key_cues: Starts standing, hips push back, legs nearly straight, bar slides down legs, no touching floor

bench_press.key_cues: Lying on flat bench, bar descends to chest, arms fully extend, feet on floor

incline_bench.key_cues: Bench at 30-45 degrees, bar comes to upper chest, inclined torso

ohp.key_cues: Bar starts at shoulder level, pressed overhead, arms fully extend, torso vertical

barbell_row.key_cues: Torso bent forward ~45 degrees and STAYS FIXED, bar pulled to lower chest/abdomen, elbows go back

dumbbell_row.key_cues: One knee on bench, one hand on bench, dumbbell pulled up with elbow going back

hip_thrust.key_cues: Upper back on bench, feet on floor, hips drive up, bar across hips

curl.key_cues: Standing, arms curl bar from extended to fully flexed, elbows stay at sides

tricep_extension.key_cues: Standing at cable tower, arms push rope/bar down, elbows stay at sides, only forearms move

lateral_raise.key_cues: Arms raise to sides, slightly bent elbows, dumbbells go to shoulder height, torso still

face_pull.key_cues: Cable at face height, elbows come up and back, rope pulled to face, external rotation at end

pullup.key_cues: Hanging from bar, overhand grip, body pulls up until chin clears bar, arms fully extend at bottom

lat_pulldown.key_cues: Seated, bar pulled from overhead down to upper chest, elbows drive down, legs secured under pads

leg_press.key_cues: Seated in reclined machine, feet on platform, legs push weight away, back stays fixed

leg_extension.key_cues: Seated in machine, only lower leg moves, extends from flexed to straight, nothing else moves

leg_curl.key_cues: Lying face down, lower legs curl toward glutes, hips stay on pad, only knee joint moves

goblet_squat.key_cues: Weight held at chest height with both hands, very upright torso, deep squat, elbows inside knees

upright_row.key_cues: Bar/dumbbells pulled vertically up along body, elbows flare out and rise above hands

cable_row.key_cues: Seated on cable machine, torso upright, handle pulled to abdomen, elbows go back

cable_curl.key_cues: Standing at cable tower low pulley, arms curl up, constant cable tension throughout

pullover.key_cues: Lying across bench, dumbbell held overhead with both hands, arms arc from behind head to over chest

cable_pullover.key_cues: Standing facing cable, arms STRAIGHT, pull rope/bar down in arc from overhead to hips, no elbow bend

dip.key_cues: Suspended on parallel bars, body dips down as elbows bend, torso upright for triceps focus

shrug.key_cues: Standing, shoulders elevate up toward ears, minimal arm bend, only traps contract

calf_raise.key_cues: Standing, heels raise up on balls of feet, legs stay straight, only ankle moves

hack_squat.key_cues: Back against angled pad, feet on platform, knees bend and extend, machine guides movement

pendlay_row.key_cues: Torso nearly parallel to floor, bar starts from floor each rep, explosive pull to chest

tbar_row.key_cues: Hinged over T-bar or landmine, narrow grip handles, bar pulled up to chest

chest_fly.key_cues: Lying on bench, arms arc wide to sides with slight elbow bend, dumbbells come together over chest

cable_crossover.key_cues: Standing between two cable towers, arms pull cables forward and together in arc

reverse_fly.key_cues: Bent over, arms raise laterally to sides with slight elbow bend, torso stays fixed

hammer_curl.key_cues: Neutral grip (thumbs up), dumbbells curl up, wrists stay neutral throughout

preacher_curl.key_cues: Arms rest on angled preacher pad, only forearms move, upper arm stays fixed on pad

skull_crusher.key_cues: Lying on bench, bar lowered toward forehead by bending elbows, upper arms stay vertical

good_morning.key_cues: Bar on back, hips hinge forward, legs nearly straight, torso bows forward, arms not involved

step_up.key_cues: One foot steps onto elevated box, single leg drives body up, other leg follows

sissy_squat.key_cues: Heels raised, body leans backward, knees travel far forward, hips stay extended throughout

decline_bench.key_cues: Bench declined, feet elevated, bar pressed to lower chest, head lower than hips

dumbbell_bench.key_cues: Lying on flat bench, dumbbells pressed up, more range than barbell, wrists neutral

dumbbell_incline.key_cues: Incline bench, dumbbells pressed overhead at incline angle, upper chest targeted

chest_dip.key_cues: Parallel bars, torso leans forward more than tricep dip, elbows flare more outward

push_up.key_cues: Prone position, hands on floor, body in plank, chest lowers to floor and pushes up

machine_chest_press.key_cues: Seated in machine, back against pad, handles pressed forward, machine guides path

svend_press.key_cues: Plates pressed together between palms at chest, arms extend forward, plates stay squeezed

landmine_press.key_cues: Bar anchored at floor, presses up at angle from chest, arc path due to pivot point

chinup.key_cues: Underhand (supinated) grip on bar, chin pulls above bar, palms face toward you

close_grip_pulldown.key_cues: Seated, V-bar or neutral grip attachment, pulled to upper chest, elbows stay closer to body

seal_row.key_cues: Lying prone on elevated bench, bar pulled from hanging to chest, body fully supported

dumbbell_ohp.key_cues: Dumbbells at shoulder height, pressed overhead, can rotate path slightly unlike barbell

arnold_press.key_cues: Starts with palms facing body, rotates to palms forward as arms press overhead

cable_lateral_raise.key_cues: Cable at low pulley beside body, arm raises laterally against cable tension, single arm

front_raise.key_cues: Arms raise forward to shoulder height or above, elbows nearly straight, torso stays upright

rear_delt_fly.key_cues: Seated at pec deck machine facing pad, arms open backward in arc

lu_raise.key_cues: Arms raise at Y angle (45 degrees in front), combination of lateral and front raise

dumbbell_curl.key_cues: Alternating or simultaneous dumbbell curls, supinated grip, elbows at sides

incline_curl.key_cues: Seated on incline bench, arms hang behind body, curls from stretched position

concentration_curl.key_cues: Seated, elbow braced against inner thigh, single arm curl, upper arm fixed

spider_curl.key_cues: Lying prone on incline bench, arms hang down, curls from fully extended position

overhead_tricep.key_cues: Weight held overhead, elbows bend to lower weight behind head, upper arms stay vertical

kickback.key_cues: Bent over, upper arm parallel to floor, forearm extends backward kicking weight out

close_grip_bench.key_cues: Like bench press but hands shoulder width or closer, elbows stay closer to body

diamond_pushup.key_cues: Hands form diamond shape under chest, elbows close to body, triceps focused push-up

cable_overhead_tricep.key_cues: Facing away from cable, rope overhead, elbows bent behind head, extends forward

walking_lunge.key_cues: Continuous stepping forward into lunge, alternating legs, travelling across space

nordic_curl.key_cues: Kneeling, feet anchored, body falls forward slowly, hamstrings eccentrically control descent

single_leg_rdl.key_cues: One leg, hip hinge, other leg extends behind for balance, weight in hand on working side

glute_ham_raise.key_cues: On GHR machine, body lowers forward then curls back up using both hip and knee flexion

cable_kickback.key_cues: Cable attached to ankle, standing on other leg, leg kicks back and up against cable tension

glute_bridge.key_cues: Lying on floor, feet flat, hips drive up to full extension, upper back stays on ground

trap_bar_deadlift.key_cues: Standing inside hexagonal bar, hands at sides, more upright torso than conventional deadlift

seated_calf_raise.key_cues: Seated, pads on knees, only heels raise and lower, knees at 90 degrees

crunch.key_cues: Lying on back, knees bent, shoulders curl up, lower back stays on floor

cable_crunch.key_cues: Kneeling at cable tower, rope at head, torso crunches down under cable resistance

hanging_leg_raise.key_cues: Hanging from bar, legs raise to horizontal or above, lower back rounds at top

ab_wheel.key_cues: Kneeling with wheel, rolls body out to extended position, abs brace throughout

plank.key_cues: Body straight from head to heels, forearms or hands on floor, static hold, no movement

woodchop.key_cues: Rotating motion diagonal across body, arms straight, hips and torso rotate

clean.key_cues: Explosive pull from floor, bar catches on shoulders/front rack, triple extension at hips knees ankles

snatch.key_cues: Bar pulled from floor to overhead in one movement, wide grip, arms lock out overhead

thruster.key_cues: Front squat into overhead press in one fluid motion, squat drives momentum into press
